title: marsilea quadrifoliata
intro: Marsilea quadrifoliata, also known as the four-leaf clover fern, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Marsileaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Marsilea quadrifoliata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a range of health issues.
